comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Howl (2-knob). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 5-knob desktop-preview manifest. Drive (in-loop fuzz), Tone, and Mix are baked in howl.c.
gid_comment: 0x01 = Dynamics category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DYN_. All custom effects grouped under Dynamics.

params.name: Annihil
